title: Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.json - the signed catalog index distributed to clients

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the manifest was generated

publicKey.description: Ed25519 public key in hex used to verify the signature

signature.description: Ed25519 signature of the manifest in hex

systems.description: Array of system entries in the catalog

datVersion.description: Version of the source DAT file

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the JSONL artifact in hex

size.description: Size in bytes of the JSONL artifact

url.description: URL to download the JSONL artifact

entries.description: Number of game entries in this system

dictionary.description: Optional dictionary metadata for zstd compression

urlFallback.description: Optional fallback URL if primary URL fails

deltaFrom.description: Optional previous manifest version this is a delta from
